simple_types.name: bit
simple_types.code:
type bit is range 0 .. 1
  with Size => 1;

documentation.description: Some unchecked conversions to convert between unsigned and signed values.

simple_types.name: int16
simple_types.code:
type int16 is range -(2**15) .. 2**15 - 1
  with size => 16;

documentation.description: Some unchecked conversions to convert between unsigned and signed values.

simple_types.name: int32
simple_types.code:
type int32 is range -(2**31) .. 2**31 - 1
  with Size => 32;

documentation.description: Some unchecked conversions to convert between unsigned and signed values.

simple_types.name: int64
simple_types.code:
type int64 is range -(2**63) .. 2**63 - 1
  with Size => 64;

documentation.description: Some unchecked conversions to convert between unsigned and signed values.

simple_types.name: int8
simple_types.code:
type int8 is range -128 .. 127
  with size => 8;

documentation.description: Some unchecked conversions to convert between unsigned and signed values.

simple_types.name: uint16
simple_types.code:
type uint16 is mod 2**16
  with Size => 16;

documentation.description: Some unchecked conversions to convert between unsigned and signed values.

simple_types.name: uint32
simple_types.code:
type uint32 is mod 2**32
  with Size => 32;

documentation.description: Some unchecked conversions to convert between unsigned and signed values.

simple_types.name: uint64
simple_types.code:
type uint64 is mod 2**64
  with Size => 64;

documentation.description: Some unchecked conversions to convert between unsigned and signed values.

simple_types.name: uint8
simple_types.code:
type uint8 is mod 2**8
  with size => 8;

documentation.description: Some unchecked conversions to convert between unsigned and signed values.

generic_instantiations.name: int16_to_uint16
generic_instantiations.code:
function int16_to_uint16 is
  new Ada.Unchecked_Conversion(source => int16, target => uint16);

generic_instantiations.name: int64_to_uint64
generic_instantiations.code:
function int64_to_uint64 is
  new Ada.Unchecked_Conversion(source => int64, target => uint64);

generic_instantiations.name: int8_to_uint8
generic_instantiations.code:
function int8_to_uint8 is
  new Ada.Unchecked_Conversion(source => int8, target => uint8);

generic_instantiations.name: int_to_uint32
generic_instantiations.code:
function int_to_uint32 is
   new Ada.Unchecked_Conversion(source => Integer, target => uint32);

generic_instantiations.name: uint16_to_int16
generic_instantiations.code:
function uint16_to_int16 is
  new Ada.Unchecked_Conversion(source => uint16, target => int16);

generic_instantiations.name: uint32_to_int
generic_instantiations.code:
function uint32_to_int is
   new Ada.Unchecked_Conversion(source => uint32, target => Integer);

generic_instantiations.name: uint64_to_int64
generic_instantiations.code:
function uint64_to_int64 is
  new Ada.Unchecked_Conversion(source => uint64, target => int64);

generic_instantiations.name: uint8_to_int8
generic_instantiations.code:
function uint8_to_int8 is
  new Ada.Unchecked_Conversion(source => uint8, target => int8);
